chinese_news.title: 映界科技：一支00后团队的空间智能“赌注” | 水下项目
chinese_news.summary:
当人形机器人在春晚上扭秧歌，在马拉松赛场上健步如飞，一个尴尬的现实浮出水面：机器人会动、很灵活，但不能干活——前者考验运动控制能力，后者还需要机器人真正理解物理环境，记住物体位置、推理空间关系。

感知瓶颈是今天几乎所有具身智能从业者都无法回避的现实。成立不到三个月的「映界科技」（MirrorSpace）正试图补齐具身智能产业链中的这个短板。映界科技由三位平均年龄仅有24岁的博士团队创办，专注具身机器人视觉空间感知系统的算法与硬件研发，致力于成为世界模型时代的基础设施服务商。

“我们注意到，目前市面上还没有相对成熟完善的空间感知解决方案，大部分做传感器的企业只是把雷达、摄像头等设备的原始数据丢给本体厂商，让他们自己想办法处理。”金依力表示，“我们希望提供一整套空间感知能力，弥合机器人在开放场景应用落地的gap。”

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜赢创计划全球裁员3200人；台积电28nm较年初减产25%；三星电子向韩国所有员工开放ChatGPT和Codex
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

赢创计划全球裁员3200人

赢创近日宣布，将延长“赢创定制”增效计划，涉及赢创全球所有业务及职能部门，拟裁减约3200个岗位，其中德国本土约占2150个。相关措施计划于2027年启动，持续至2029年底。6月22日，赢创确认，德国以外地区将削减1050个职位，中国区包含在内，但具体裁员数量尚未明确。“赢创定制”计划于2023年10月推出，原定目标为2026年底前累计削减约2800个岗位。今年5月，赢创曾表示该计划进展顺利并将实现既定降本目标。

chinese_news.title: 圆桌论坛：在没人相信之前，乘风破浪的创er | 36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
每一个创业者，都有一段“没人相信”的日子。但正是那段日子，把他们推向了浪尖。创业是鲜活的，接下来这一场，我们听一听那些在质疑声中长大的创业者，怎么把“不可能”变成“不，可能”。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑:

许嘉婧｜36氪后浪研究所 主理人（主持人）

徐子悦 ｜PhotonPay 光子易商务副总裁

程刚｜KOOK语音 创始人兼CEO

徐良威｜智域基石CTO

程二亭｜万拿机器人 创始人&CEO

薛昊昕｜

chinese_news.title: 圆桌讨论：在番禺，我们造了什么？｜36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以“今年盛夏”为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些“少数人” 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 联想之星险峰联合领投，AI算力中心感知与效能管理方案商完成天使轮融资
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，芯感通科技有限公司（以下简称“芯感通”）日前完成数千万元天使轮融资，由联想之星与险峰联合领投。本轮融资将主要用于芯片研发迭代、产品验证及市场拓展。

随着大模型训练规模持续扩大和商业服务展开，AI算力基础设施的铺设在快速亟需高效能运营，同时，高性能GPU也将算力推入高能量密度、高功耗时代。

从单柜数十张GPU到万卡集群，数据中心内部的供电、散热和能耗管理正在成为新的技术瓶颈。与此同时，太空算力、轨道数据中心等新兴方向兴起，也对系统稳定性和精密感知能力提出了更高要求。这一背景下，芯感通选择从算力基础设施中一个日益关键的环节切入——电流与空间磁场感知。

电流与功率感知领域，传统的霍尔传感器存在噪声高、温漂大等问题，在高密度、大电流场景下难以兼顾量程与分辨率，无法满足AI服务器对精细化电源管理的需求；传统磁通门传感器则采用绕线结构，体积较大、集成度较低，同时难以满足高频应用需求。<

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 by end of June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Friday options expiry at $60k support coincides with US-Iran geopolitical relief narrative and dollar strength headwinds creating binary volatility setup.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Bitcoin options expiry focus, $54-64k range debate); Cointelegraph (USD strength at May 2025 highs pressuring BTC).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Fed chair Powell signal rate cuts before September 2026 FOMC meeting?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Treasury yields rising (10Y at 4.483%) and inflation data imminent; Warsh Fed narrative (CoinDesk) suggests dovish pivot possible if data softens.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Treasury yields, inflation data tracking); CoinDesk (Geopolitical relief meets Warsh Fed commentary).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX stock recover to IPO pricing by Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Post-IPO (June 12) rally has cooled with two consecutive down days; technical pullback creates obvious mean-reversion thesis.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (SpaceX stock drops after blockbuster IPO; record breaking June 12 pricing baseline).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum spot ETF fee compression below 0.15% by September 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Morgan Stanley filing ETFs at 0.14% (cheapest globally) triggers competitive fee war; resolution depends on Blackrock/Fidelity response.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Morgan Stanley 0.14% fee announcement; Eric Balchunas analysis).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will US-Iran final nuclear deal be signed within 60 days of May 5, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BBC reports first round talks ended with 'encouraging progress' and explicit 60-day timeline; binary geopolitical catalyst affects oil/USD/risk appetite.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: BBC World (US-Iran talks in Switzerland; 60-day final deal commitment stated explicitly).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Taiko (TAIKO) token recover above its pre-exploit price by July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap historical price feed for TAIKO on or before deadline.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Bridge exploit ($1.7M drain) triggered panic sell-off, but Taiko is a live Ethereum L2 with user base; recovery thesis underpriced if exploit is patched cleanly and doesn't reflect fundamental viability.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Taiko halts L2 network post-exploit; token dive reported); large liquidations suggest local bottom forming.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will UK FTSE 100 outperform S&P 500 in total return through August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg total return indices (FTSE 100 TR vs SPX TR) from May 5 close to August 31 close.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Starmer resignation (7th PM in 10 years) signals UK political instability, but currency devaluation + defensive dividend yield (FTSE) overlooked; Sterling weakness a hedge.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Starmer resignation as systemic UK governance crisis); typically underpriced due to negative sentiment bias.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will DXY (US Dollar Index) close above 108 on December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: ICE DXY futures settlement price on December 31, 2026 contract or spot close.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports USD strength at May 2025 highs; if Fed cuts rates before September (Warsh pivot), dollar reversal priced in too early; geopolitical instability (Iran, Ukraine, India-Pakistan) supports safe-haven bid.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (US dollar strength at May 2025 highs); multiple geopolitical flashpoints (Hormuz, Ukraine, India-Pakistan water treaty) support continued USD premium.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA close above $150 by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: NASDAQ: NVDA closing price on September 30, 2026 or last trading day of Q3.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese retaliation on US tech firms (Pentagon 1260H list expanded) creates near-term headwind, but NVDA not explicitly blacklisted; AI capex cycle remains intact and underpriced given geopolitical noise.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (China imposes trade curbs on dozens of US firms in Pentagon retaliation); NVDA exposure to China demand creates volatility but not terminal risk.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana (SOL) outperform Ethereum (ETH) by >10% through September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap price feeds; calculate (SOL return % - ETH return %) from May 5 close.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Hacker News sentiment favors open models and sovereignty (Apertus, Deno) — Solana's decentralized validator story + lower fee model positioned well vs Ethereum ETF consolidation and Morgan Stanley fee compression narrative.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hacker News (Apertus open foundation model, 'minimal downside to switching to open models' — 232 score); Crypto trending (Solana in top 6 movers); Cointelegraph (Ethereum fee compression removes performance edge).

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY / short EUR via DXY futures or EUR/USD currency pair into December 2026 as geopolitical bifurcation (Iran nuclear talks risk reversal, Ukraine escalation, India-Pakistan water dispute, UK political chaos) sustains safe-haven dollar bid despite Fed rate-cut chatter.
investment_theses.horizon: 3–7 months (through September 2026, re-evaluate at FOMC guidance shifts)
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: USD strength at May 2025 highs; dollar resurgence despite crypto optimism on geopolitical relief.
BBC: US-Iran talks progress but heightened regional tension (Strait of Hormuz closure, Russian Donbas threats, India-Pakistan Indus Water Treaty dispute).
CNBC: Treasury yields rising (10Y at 4.483%) despite rate-cut expectations — curve inversion suggests duration demand.
China trade retaliation vs US tech (Pentagon 1260H list) creates tail risk for US equities, supporting defensive USD flows.
investment_theses.counter_view: If Fed cuts rates aggressively before September (Warsh narrative fully materializes) and geopolitical de-escalation accelerates (Iran nuclear deal signed, Ukraine ceasefire), dollar weakness re-accelerates and risk assets rally hard; carry trade unwinds dollar longs.
investment_theses.expression: DXY futures (CME) long Jan 2027 contract; or short EUR/USD spot at current levels (~1.10) with September 2026 expiry.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Ethereum spot ETF (ETHE, ETHK) on expectation of fee compression cascade below 0.14% by Q3 2026 drives AUM inflows and retail adoption, offsetting near-term technical weakness (Taiko bridge exploit contagion, staking proposal governance noise).
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Morgan Stanley filing 0.14% fee ETFs (globally cheapest); analyst Eric Balchunas signals imminent competitive response from Blackrock/Fidelity.
Bank of England easing stablecoin rules (40B GBP cap) removes regulatory overhang and signals institutional on-ramp appetite.
Ethereum ecosystem governance (staking proposal for project funding) shows active development momentum despite short-term noise.
Taiko bridge exploit is L2-specific and does not reflect core Ethereum protocol risk; sentiment overweight on exploit cascades.
investment_theses.counter_view: Fee compression below 0.10% triggers a race-to-zero margin event; ETF inflows canalized into passive trackers rather than driving token appreciation. Ethereum's on-chain activity and DeFi volumes stagnate if macro headwinds (rate cuts postponed, dollar strength) persist.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETHE (Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust) or ETHK (iShares Ethereum Trust) with 4-month horizon; delta hedge with short ETH spot or perps if macro volatility spikes.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC spot above $65k by June 30, 2026 as geopolitical relief (US-Iran 60-day final deal pathway, potential Ukraine ceasefire signals) and institutional ETF optionality (Friday $60k options expiry creating gamma hedge demand) override near-term dollar strength and inflation data risk.
supporting_signals: BBC: US-Iran talks ended Round 1 with 'encouraging progress' and explicit 60-day final deal timeline; Hormuz closure rhetoric softens risk premium.
CoinDesk: Bitcoin options expiry at $60k support with analyst calls for $54-64k range recovery; gamma dynamics favor upside breakout.
Cointelegraph: July seasonality traditionally bullish; summer relief rally after May sell-off common pattern.
Crypto trending: Synapse (SYN), Arcium (ARX), Hyperliquid (HYPE) momentum suggests retail FOMO on risk-on narrative.
investment_theses.counter_view: If inflation data (CPI due early June) surprise hot, Fed delays rate cuts and Treasury yields spike further; dollar strength accelerates and BTC corrects to $54-56k. Geopolitical deal failure (Iran negotiations collapse) triggers flight-to-safety USD bid.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perps (Binance, Bybit, Hyperliquid) 3-5x leverage with stop at $60,500; or long BTC spot with short DXY hedge to isolate geopolitical beta. Exit on $65k touch or break below $59,500.

investment_theses.thesis: Long China-exposed tech (BIDU, TCEHY, JD via Tencent/Baidu ADRs or Hong Kong listings) as US-China tech trade war (Pentagon 1260H blacklist expansion, trade curbs on dozens of US firms) forces Beijing to prioritize domestic AI capex and sovereign tech stack — 36Kr/Yicai coverage of chiplet sensing (芯感通) and MirrorSpace embodied AI signals downstream capex surge.
supporting_signals: CNBC: China imposes trade curbs on dozens of US firms in Pentagon retaliation; widening bifurcation of tech supply chains.
36Kr: MirrorSpace (embodied AI spatial sensing) and 芯感通 (chiplet sensing for AI infrastructure) fundraising ($10M+ angel round for chiplet shop) indicates Chinese AI infra cycle accelerating.
36Kr WAVES 2026 coverage shows Chinese hard tech (robotics, sensors, AI chips) moving into mainstream consensus; VC capital flowing into domestic alternatives.
Taiwan Semiconductor: 28nm capacity down 25% YoY (36Kr Yicai coverage) suggests SMIC/Chinese fabs gaining share for lower-end training inference.
investment_theses.counter_view: US export controls on advanced semiconductors tighten faster than expected (Biden administration pressure); Chinese fabs cannot ramp 7nm/5nm tech fast enough to offset loss of TSMC supply. Domestic AI capex plans face financing constraints if property sector weakness persists.
investment_theses.expression: Long BIDU or TCEHY ADRs (tech exposure with China reopening optionality); or direct Hong Kong listing plays (0700.HK Tencent, 9618.HK JD.com). 4-6 month horizon with stop at 15% drawdown from entry.

investment_theses.thesis: Short UK equity risk (FTSE 100) on political dysfunction (Starmer resignation, 7th PM in 10 years) creating overhang, but hedge via long GBP/USD volatility or short Gilt duration as Bank of England holds rates steady longer than Fed — Sterling weakness (DXY strength) pairs with domestic political instability to create asymmetric short setup.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Starmer resignation signals systemic UK governance crisis; seventh PM in decade reflects broken Westminster stability narrative.
Bank of England stablecoin rules ease but no rate-cut signal; BoE more hawkish relative to Fed on duration.
FTSE 100 heavily weighted to defensives and dividends, underperforms risk-on rally if geopolitical relief materializes.
French heat wave and European political instability (beyond UK) create broader developed market political risk premium.
investment_theses.counter_view: If US-Iran deal stabilizes and Fed signals aggressive cuts, UK defensive dividend stocks outperform as yield compression rotates capital to high-dividend FTSE names. Sterling rebounds if BoE signals surprise rate cut. Incoming PM stabilizes sentiment faster than expected.
investment_theses.expression: Short FTSE 100 index futures or VTI-style UK equity ETF; hedge via long GBP/USD put spread or short duration Gilt futures (GBPU) to profit from political instability without currency directional bet.
